message:
🐛 fix: add createCachedHook to cache mocks + isDemoFallback loading guard (#10636)

All useCached* hooks migrated to createCachedHook factory in PRs #10627
and #10634 were missing the factory function in their vi.mock() calls,
causing 'Cannot access createCachedHook before initialization' errors
and test suite load failures in CI.

Changes:
- Add createCachedHook: (_config) => () => mockUseCache(_config) to 12
  hook test files (Rook, Tikv, Vitess, Otel, Dragonfly, Longhorn,
  Backstage, CloudCustodian — both -funcs and main test variants)
- Rewrite useCachedThanosStatus.test.tsx to use vi.hoisted() for the
  mock function (avoids TDZ with async importOriginal) and explicitly
  mock createCachedHook; also handle getDemoData factory in mock
  CLAUDE.md requirement ('Never use demo data during loading')
- Fix pre-existing no-explicit-any lint errors in 4 test files

Fixes 14 failing test files from Coverage Suite CI run.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ const mockFetchLLMdModels = vi.fn()
 
 vi.mock('../../lib/cache', () => ({
   useCache: (...args: unknown[]) => mockUseCache(...args),
+  createCachedHook: (_config: unknown) => () => mockUseCache(_config),
   REFRESH_RATES: {
     realtime: 15_000, pods: 30_000, clusters: 60_000,
     deployments: 60_000, services: 60_000, metrics: 45_000,

@@ -1,23 +1,29 @@
 import { vi } from 'vitest'
 
-// Mock the cache module using the same alias as the hook
+// vi.hoisted ensures mockUseCacheFn is available when vi.mock() is hoisted
+const { mockUseCacheFn } = vi.hoisted(() => {
+    const mockUseCacheFn = vi.fn().mockImplementation(
+        (options: { demoData?: unknown; getDemoData?: () => unknown }) => ({
+            data: typeof options.getDemoData === 'function' ? options.getDemoData() : options.demoData,
+            isLoading: false,
+            isRefreshing: false,
+            isDemoFallback: true,
+            error: null,
+            isFailed: false,
+            consecutiveFailures: 0,
+            lastRefresh: Date.now(),
+            refetch: vi.fn(),
+        })
+    )
+    return { mockUseCacheFn }
+})
+
 vi.mock('@/lib/cache', async (importOriginal) => {
-    const actual = await importOriginal() as any
+    const actual = await importOriginal() as Record<string, unknown>
     return {
         ...actual,
-        useCache: vi.fn().mockImplementation((options) => {
-            return {
-                data: options.demoData,
-                isLoading: false,
-                isRefreshing: false,
-                isDemoFallback: true,
-                error: null,
-                isFailed: false,
-                consecutiveFailures: 0,
-                lastRefresh: Date.now(),
-                refetch: vi.fn(),
-            }
-        }),
+        useCache: mockUseCacheFn,
+        createCachedHook: (_config: unknown) => () => mockUseCacheFn(_config),
     }
 })

@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@ export function createCachedHook<T>(
       data: result.data,
       isLoading: result.isLoading,
       isRefreshing: result.isRefreshing,
-      isDemoFallback: result.isDemoFallback,
+      isDemoFallback: result.isDemoFallback && !result.isLoading,
       error: result.error,
       isFailed: result.isFailed,
       consecutiveFailures: result.consecutiveFailures,
